positive: A stylized, abstract composition of cosmic flora and fauna. Imagine bioluminescent celestial mushrooms glowing amidst intricate, vine-like nebulae and floating geometric planets. The main subject is a central, stylized celestial deer silhouette drinking from a glowing crystalline pond. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets Vaporwave cosmic aesthetics. Composition: Symmetrical, centered, high contrast. Lighting: Dramatic rim lighting and soft, ethereal glow emanating from the flora. Color direction: Deep indigo, vibrant magenta, electric teal, and accented with luminous gold. Print-friendly details: Clean vector lines, bold silhouettes, non-photorealistic, high detail level suitable for screen printing or direct-to-garment printing.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, signature, watermark, text, lettering, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, poor composition, blurry, amateur, jpeg artifacts, photorealistic, 3d render, messy, cluttered
